simple_types.name: Address
simple_types.code: TYPE Address             IS NEW Natural RANGE 0 .. 30;

array_types.name: ByteArray
array_types.code: TYPE ByteArray           IS ARRAY (Natural RANGE <>) OF Byte;

access_types.name: Controller
access_types.code: TYPE Controller          IS ACCESS ALL ControllerInterface'Class;

subprograms.name: Get
subprograms.code: FUNCTION Get(Self : IN OUT ControllerInterface) RETURN String

subprograms.name: Put
subprograms.code: PROCEDURE Put(Self : IN OUT ControllerInterface; cmd : String)

subprograms.name: SelectSlave
subprograms.code: PROCEDURE SelectSlave(Self : IN OUT ControllerInterface; slave : Address)
